name: Salsa Pesto
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Fresh basil leaves - loosely packed
recipeInstructions:
1. Pick through basil and remove large stems and any bad leaves. Chop basil finely in a food processor. Add onions and garlic to the bowl of the processor and puree.
2. Set aside the basil puree in a large bowl. Put one stick of butter into the processor and whiz it. Add half the olive oil, followed by another stick of butter, then the remaining half of the olive oil, blending well as you go until you have a thick liquid.
3. Pour the butter-oil mixture into the bowl with the basil puree. Add Parmesan cheese, salt, and pepper. Stir until everything is well blended.
NOTE: When making pasta with pesto, put hot cooked pasta in a skillet over medium heat. Spoon four tablespoons of pesto sauce over the pasta and toss gently with a kitchen fork to combine. Do not add the sauce to the skillet first; always transfer it to the pasta.
Makes 3 cups - enough for 12 servings.
